mnemonics: IACE: Identify Attributes, Classes, and Entities. Think of it as 'I Ace' my analysis by finding these core components.
keyPoints: Information classes represent persistent data stored by the system.
Analysis classes are conceptual classes identified during analysis to represent key domain abstractions.
They are a stepping stone between requirements and design, helping to create a robust domain model.
commonMistakes: Confusing analysis classes with design or implementation classes (e.g., database tables or UI components).
Defining classes with too many responsibilities (God classes) instead of following the Single Responsibility Principle.
